programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: (MA) Corey seemed sweet, but his grip tightened as Lisa fell in love. Lisa survived his brutal attack, but his next victim didn't. Now, he answers her questions from behind bars.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: (M) The family of a high school cheerleader finds her murdered in her room the night after the homecoming dance; detectives surmise that she knew her killer.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
